leadText: Swadloon (Japanese: クルマユ Kurumayu) is a dual-type Bug/Grass Pokémon introduced in Generation V. It evolves from Sewaddle starting at level 20 and evolves into Leavanny when leveled up with high friendship.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Swadloon is a round, yellow Pokémon with two stubby arms inside of a cloak of leaves. It drapes the leaves over itself and draws them closed around its body, so only a large, crescent slit remains for its face to appear. This leafy cloak keeps the Pokémon warm. Under its cloak are darker green, limp leaves that frame the sides of Swadloon's face and trail down on the sides of its body. The top of the cloak has two semicircular leaves that form a V shape. These two head leaves allow Swadloon to detect air movements and feel the surrounding area. On its back are the veins of the leaf as well as a bit at the bottom tip of the cloak resembling a rounded tail. Swadloon lives on the forest floor and converts fallen leaves into nourishment, which helps the surrounding plant life grow. Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Swadloon evolves from Sewaddle and evolves into Leavanny . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Sewaddle Bug Grass → First Evolution Swadloon Bug Grass → Second Evolution Leavanny Bug Grass

Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] This Pokémon was unavailable prior to Generation V. Generation V Unova B W : #047 Unova B2 W2 : #018 Black Forests where Swadloon live have superb foliage because the nutrients they make from fallen leaves nourish the plant life. White It protects itself from the cold by wrapping up in leaves. It stays on the move, eating leaves in forests. Black 2 Preferring dark, damp places, it spends the entire day eating fallen leaves that lie around it. White 2 Generation VI Central Kalos #— Coastal Kalos #— Mountain Kalos #— Hoenn #— X Forests where Swadloon live have superb foliage because the nutrients they make from fallen leaves nourish the plant life. Y It protects itself from the cold by wrapping up in leaves. It stays on the move, eating leaves in forests. Omega Ruby Forests where Swadloon live have superb foliage because the nutrients they make from fallen leaves nourish the plant life. Alpha Sapphire It protects itself from the cold by wrapping up in leaves. It stays on the move, eating leaves in forests. Generation VII Alola #— Kanto #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Generation VII . Generation VIII Galar #— Isle of Armor #— Crown Tundra #— Sinnoh #— Hisui #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Generation VIII . Generation IX Paldea #— Kitakami #14 Blueberry #— Lumiose #— Hyperspace #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Legends: Z-A . Scarlet Swadloon lives quietly at the feet of trees. It prefers eating fallen leaves that have grown soft rather than fresh ones. Violet Swadloon wraps itself in leaves for protection. It uses the two leaves atop its head to detect air movements and feel out its surroundings. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry BW023 Swadloon Ash's Pokédex Swadloon, the Leaf-Wrapped Pokémon and the evolved form of Sewaddle . Swadloon's body is covered in leaves which protect it from the cold. In forests where Swadloon live, the trees and grass grow very well.
